subcodes.first_line: At dawn the Friend came to my bed:  “O fool for love, O broken heart, O thou, who pinest for Me wherever thou art
subcodes.first_line_orig: سحر آمد به بسترم یار کی شوریده ز عشق وی دل افکار ای برایم فتاده بهر سوئی وی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @presence of; reunion with God, @poems and quotation from poetry, @pain of love; love as veil, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
